question.label: Scope conversation
question.name: What support from me would make the biggest difference on the scope conversation?
question.description: Land the session by inviting the most useful manager support around the scope discussion she wants sooner.

answer: A clear next-step path would help me reset my energy.

assessment.note: Names a missing clear next-step path as the support she lacks, signaling low clarity and growth confidence and a strong wellbeing drag; final turn so closer served.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given all that, what's the first concrete thing you want to move by our next check-in?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel lighter or sharper?

issues: ref_alias q_next_two_weeks_9 not in remaining queue — treating as new

history.answer_excerpt: If there is a bigger scope conversation, I want it sooner rather than later.
A clear next-step path would help me reset my energy.
The launch went well, but this week I feel flatter than I expected.
Mostly cleanup and reviews right now, not much that feels new.
I am proud of the migration plan and how we handled the cutover.
I did mention mentoring before. I still want it, but I stopped pushing.
I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.
I have felt a bit stuck doing similar work for months.
